ShortDescription.Value: Adjust Bikes, Path Speed Limits. Detailed Status Report :)

Publish.LongDescription:
🚴 **Path speed limit** - adjust bike and pedestrian paths (paths are independent of road speed limits) !
🚲 **Bike speeds** increase or decrease bicycles + scooters. Speed can be disabled [x] if you just want the paths.
🚴 **Status report** - compare Bike count versus Cars count and usage (Stats can be used without enabling Bikes or Path speed checkbox ✅ at all). - road speed mods don't let you set "path" speed limits, so that is unique to this mod.
### Features - ✅ Speed ⬆️ ⬇️ - ✅ Smoothing math for acceleration + braking (no teleport and panic braking) - ✅ One-click Reset buttons.
---
## Tech notes - Road speed limits and game conditions may still cap speeds on bikes in roads. - Path speed limit - for both bike and pedestrian paths. - Compatible with "Road Speed Adjuster" mod (as that does normal roads and not Paths). - To disable the mod without uninstalling, uncheck [ ] the enable box. - Safe to remove (Reset button first for fast return to game defaults, then save city, and uninstall). If you don't reset, it's not a problem, you keep the changed paths until you replace your paths since they are vanilla paths.
### Support and Feedback - If you enjoy free volunteer made mods, don't forget to click Like, top right button. Players can find the mod easier, we get nothing else for it. - Report issues on Github or Discord, link icons on the right.
### Design + Performance - Bikes + Paths is built to be lightweight. It's partly why this was made; to have a mod that does not have parts that run in the city per-frame all the time. - No Harmony patch. It works to apply tuning when you change settings (or when a city loads), then goes idle, simple. - Status report refreshes only when the Options menu is open (to not affect city gameplay performance). - This is a brief idea, there is much more; be sure, effort is made for these details because I like the idea I can run these kind of mods even on an old laptop. - Supports 11+ languages: Hello, Bonjour, Hola, Hallo, Ciao, こんにちは, 안녕하세요, Cześć, Olá, 你好, 你好, Merhaba, Xin chào
### Credits - River-mochi - author
tags: slow bike, bicycle speed, fix bike traffic, scooter, quality of life, change path speed, bike path, slow path, slow cims
Publish.ChangeLog: - Added Thai and Ukrainian languages. - Fixed settings now saves immediately. - Internal rename — your settings carry over automatically. If a slider looks reset, just set it once and restart. - No changes to bike or path speed tuning.
